scripts.tauri:build:mac: node ../../scripts/sign-macos-binaries.mjs && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.macos.conf.json && pnpm copy-installer
scripts.tauri:build:mac:unsigned: env -u APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY -u APPLE_TEAM_ID -u APPLE_ID -u APPLE_PASSWORD tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.macos.unsigned.conf.json && pnpm copy-installer
scripts.tauri:build:mac:unsigned:arm: env -u APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY -u APPLE_TEAM_ID -u APPLE_ID -u APPLE_PASSWORD tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.macos.unsigned.conf.json --target aarch64-apple-darwin && pnpm copy-installer
scripts.tauri:build:mac:unsigned:intel: env -u APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY -u APPLE_TEAM_ID -u APPLE_ID -u APPLE_PASSWORD tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.macos.unsigned.conf.json --target x86_64-apple-darwin && pnpm copy-installer
scripts.tauri:build:mac:unsigned:universal: env -u APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY -u APPLE_TEAM_ID -u APPLE_ID -u APPLE_PASSWORD tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.macos.unsigned.conf.json --target universal-apple-darwin && pnpm copy-installer

scripts.tauri:build:mac-intel: node ../../scripts/sign-macos-binaries.mjs && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.macos.conf.json --target x86_64-apple-darwin && pnpm copy-installer
scripts.tauri:build:mac-universal: node ../../scripts/sign-macos-binaries.mjs && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.macos.conf.json --target universal-apple-darwin && pnpm copy-installer
